title: PinBaseMods
description: A lightweight modpack focused on enhancing your game experience with some qol and performance mods.
body:
The PinBaseMods modpack is designed for players who love vanilla Minecraft but want a more polished and convenient experience. It includes a curated selection of QoL mods that improve performance and overall usability without straying far from the original game.

Expect smoother gameplay with performance boosters like Sodium and Lithium, better game tools with mods like litematica, minihud, and others.

This pack is ideal for casual players, builders, and survival adventurers who want a clean, fast, and frustration-free experience — all while keeping the spirit of vanilla intact. No overhauls, no massive changes — just Minecraft, but better.
